sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on white divider squares
# They're at rows 10,14,18,22,26,30,34,38,42,46,50 and cols 32-33
# Let me try a few of them

for row in [10, 22, 34]:
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': 32}])
    print(f"Click divider [{row},32]: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
    print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        break

# If none worked, let me try a completely different approach
# Move green to center and try stamping both, then clicking empty gray box
if not last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
    # First move green to center [40,10]
    # Green is currently at [40,10], let me verify
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'N':
            b = n['boundary']
            print(f"\nGreen at: [{min(p[0] for p in b)},{min(p[1] for p in b)}]")
    
    # Stamp both
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 48}])  # Red
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])  # Blue
    
    # Click empty gray box
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 10}])
    print(f"Click empty gray box: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
    
    # If not done, click red block
    if not last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 26, 'col': 20}])
        print(f"Click red block: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
    
    # If not done, click yellow block
    if not last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 25}])
        print(f"Click yellow: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
